# Devops

CI/CD, containers, infrastructure-as-code, and orchestration.

| [`docker-basics`](./docker-basics/SKILL.md) | `docker`, `container`, `dockerfile`, `compose`, `devops` | Docker best practices for developers — Dockerfile patterns, multi-stage builds, image optimization, docker-compose for local dev, security hardening, and .dockerignore. Use this skill when containerizing an application, optimizing image size, or setting up a local development environment. |
| [`github-actions`](./github-actions/SKILL.md) | `github-actions`, `ci-cd`, `devops`, `automation`, `github` | GitHub Actions CI/CD patterns — workflow structure, common triggers, matrix builds, caching, secrets management, reusable workflows, and deployment patterns. Use this skill when setting up or optimizing CI/CD pipelines on GitHub. |
| [`k8s-fundamentals`](./k8s-fundamentals/SKILL.md) | `kubernetes`, `k8s`, `devops`, `deployment`, `container` | Kubernetes fundamentals for developers — pods, deployments, services, configmaps, secrets, health checks, resource limits, and common debugging. Use this skill when deploying to Kubernetes, writing manifests, or debugging pod issues. Operator-level topics (cluster setup, networking) are out of scope. |
| [`terraform-basics`](./terraform-basics/SKILL.md) | `terraform`, `iac`, `infrastructure`, `cloud`, `devops` | Terraform fundamentals — HCL basics, resource/module structure, state management, plan/apply workflow, provider configuration, and common patterns. Use this skill when provisioning cloud infrastructure as code, reviewing Terraform configs, or setting up a new Terraform project. |
